Locust.organic_remedy: Neem-based sprays (1500ppm), deep plowing to destroy egg pods, and using noise barriers to prevent swarming.
Locust.scientific_fact: Desert locusts can eat their own weight in food every day, threatening food security.

Armyworm.organic_remedy: Apply Metarhizium anisopliae fungus or use 5% Neem Seed Kernel Extract (NSKE) in the whorls of the plants.
Armyworm.scientific_fact: They primarily attack maize and can destroy an entire field in a few nights.

Honeybee.advice: Pollinator detected. Do not use chemical pesticides. This activity is increasing your crop yield by 20-30%.
Honeybee.scientific_fact: Bees are essential for the pollination of most Indian oilseeds and pulses.
